calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-02-2011 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance, nor objection filed. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial justification for plaintiffs' failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, it is hereby ordered that this matter be dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-28-2011 Continued To May-02-11 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiffs are sanctioned $350.00 each, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 5/2/2011 at 1:30 PM, in Department 610. Proceedings not reported. (610)
